name: services-titlecased-on-save
description: User types salon services in lowercase ('manicure, pedicure, hair cut'). Bot must store the services list with each entry title-cased — *Manicure, Pedicure, Hair Cut* — not the lowercase verbatim text. Real tester report from May 6: services rendered lowercase on the generated salon site, looked unprofessional. Same fix class as the earlier businessName casing — apply normalizeBusinessName to every service entry at every save-site (extractor output, comma-split fallback, side-channel service_add, confirm-edit).
